name: Text Viewers
description: Adds live JSON and Markdown viewers to text fields with matching action tags.

authors.name: Günther Rezniczek
authors.institution: St. Elisabethgruppe GmbH - Marien Hospital Herne | Klinikum der Ruhr-Universität Bochum

action-tags.description: Render text and Notes field values as editable JSON in Ace on data entry forms and survey pages. Optional quoted parameters: initial:json, initial:raw, height:200, format:pretty, format:compact, json-only.
Render Notes field values as Markdown editor and HTML preview on data entry forms and survey pages. Optional quoted parameters: initial:md, initial:html, initial:raw, height:200, md-only.
Reserved for MD/JSON viewing of uploaded files.

project-settings.name: Output debug information to the browser console
